activities.name: Rectangular running with Expect Delays
activities.description: Somehow we lucked into a break in the rain. No photo unfortunately!

activities.name: Full tilt on Dog’s Head 2-miler
activities.description: Goal was to go at a sub 9 pace and I *almost* achieved it — had one pause. Good effort at/close to max HR.

activities.name: Little Comb with Bean
activities.description:
Can I recommend this 50 year old book as a way to understand American art in the 20th century? No one writes like Tom Wolfe, and his thesis is pretty audacious. 

Thinking of Gary Fagin who died too young and taught me everything I know about art history over beers in brew pubs.

activities.name: 1/4, walk 1/4, 1/2
activities.description: At 8 min pace as recommended by Steve.

activities.name: Drainage Transect.
activities.description: Felt tough… walked a lot and stopped a few times.

activities.name: Doing what my doctor told me to do
activities.description: Among other things I need to get a longer run in every week… ideally at least 90 mins to build aerobic capacity. Here’s my first effort… trying to go so slow that I don’t elevate the heart too much. Fun! First 2 miles with Bean.

activities.name: Step 2 in Dr Tom’s aerobic prescription
activities.description: 10x20s hill intervals, preceded by a dog-jog warmup. 20s is so short that the heart rate doesn’t spike even going at full speed. Interesting!

activities.name: Expect delays on the Tolt Pipeline
activities.description: Thanks [strava://athletes/27156228/15]Richard Gardner!

activities.name: Step 3 in Dr Tom’s prescription. 3x4 minute intervals
activities.description: This is actually the same prescription as my cardiac rehab therapist Steve gave me. Didn’t do 3 at 8 min pace, but that’s the goal.

activities.name: 2 x Dogs Head + Lake/2
activities.description: With Bean for the first two miles.

activities.name: Twinges in the hamstring
activities.description: Which is actually why I stopped at the other end of the lake yesterday.  Should have taken today off. Lesson learned.

activities.name: 2.5 of dog jog; 2 of medium work
activities.description: Heart rate seemed wrong. I have to find that fancy arm sensor I bought and promptly misplaced!

activities.name: Mixed Grill
activities.description: 3 miles stop and go with Bean + 10 x 20 second all out hills.

activities.name: On the Sammamish River Trail with Expect Delays
activities.description: Great run and coffee and time with [strava://athletes/4109629/14]Landen Buckley and Emi!

activities.name: Changing plans -> Weird shapes
activities.description: Wasn’t feeling it after 200 meters, so changed plans then kept changing them… had Bean with me for the last mile

activities.name: Slowest dog jog on record
activities.description: Was saving all my energy to run long after dropping Bean off, but couldn’t quite muster the will to go on. Oh well. A few miles are better than none.

activities.name: Return to the Slumped Slice of Toast
activities.description: Noticably  better than my recent runs. And fun to run into [strava://athletes/37571169/14]Lauren Gaylord and [strava://athletes/48694473/13]Caitlin Anday on their run.

activities.name: 2 on the treadmill
activities.description: One Mile up, one mile flat

activities.name: 3x800 intervals, of sorts
activities.description: Almost able to do them at increasing pace. That will be the goal for next time

activities.name: First calibration run of 2026
activities.description: Ooof. I had been avoiding this run for the last 6 weeks. Was intimidated by the continuous improvement every month since my surgery, realizing that it had probably ended. Today I put on my big boy pants and gave it my best shot. A little slower than Nov and Dec, but I’m hopeful I can get a bit better.

activities.name: Expect Sauna!
activities.description: Can’t recommend Oleg and Vihta Sauna highly enough. Great experience on a rainy morning.

activities.name: 5 x Kenwood Hill
activities.description: More of a shuffle than a run these days. But shuffling is ok.

activities.name: Warm up then 20s hill sprints with Chris
activities.description: Next time will get a photo!

activities.name: Comb it if you’ve got it
activities.description: Good pace… too good in first couple of miles. 2 stops and lots of walks.
